brief_justification: Arrives at exactly $11,166 with correctly chained year-by-year arithmetic matching ground truth; analysis is purely mechanical — no second-order effects or deeper structural insight explored; agent injects its own reasoning context about tracking periods independently, showing modest process awareness; full table of intermediate values allows reproduction but no re-derivation from an alternate angle; deterministic math problem presented appropriately without over-claiming uncertainty; no competing methods evaluated, though the problem admits only one correct approach; every balance step is explicitly shown and traceable by a third party; the injection's negative gate concerns R&D funding decisions — entirely mismatched to the question — so avoidance is trivial and unaddressed; suppressed failure modes (immediate-payoff bias, ignoring downstream effects) are domain-irrelevant and the agent substitutes its own math-specific suppress signals without engaging the injected ones; the injected topology is an NPV decision DAG unrelated to compound-interest calculation, and the agent correctly uses a linear sequential approach rather than forcing an inapplicable graph structure.
